pi_items.source: Task evaluation script export_result.sh hardcodes EXPORT_DIR='/home/ga/repo_export' and setup_task.sh cleans up this specific directory.
setup_task.sh uploads the artifact to TARGET_REPO='example-repo-local', which is a default repository in JFrog Artifactory OSS.
The setup_artifactory.sh script downloads COMMONS_LANG_VERSION='3.14.0' jar from Maven Central, and setup_task.sh deploys it to the repository.
The artifact commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar downloaded from Maven Central has an exact size of 657,952 bytes. The 500,000 bytes minimum is a valid and correct threshold for the export check.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting a JFrog Artifactory repository. The target export directory is '/home/ga/repo_export'. The repository 'example-repo-local' contains a single artifact, 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar', which is downloaded from Maven Central and has a size of 657,952 bytes. The 500,000 bytes minimum export size threshold correctly ensures the artifact is included in the export.
